summary: Completed comprehensive testing of shop EDIT (PATCH) functionality for multi-tenant bridal booking SaaS. All backend APIs, admin UI edit features, and public booking page updates are working correctly. Tenant isolation verified. Regression tests pass 35/35.
passed_tests: Backend: PATCH /api/shops/{shop_id} updates name, role_label, address, phone, email, blurb, hours_text (23/23 tests passed)
Backend: POST /api/shops creates additional location with seeded availability
Backend: GET /api/shops returns 2+ locations after creation
Backend: DELETE /api/shops/{id} blocked when only one location remains (400)
Backend: Public GET /api/shops (no auth) returns shop details with updated names and addresses
Backend: Tenant isolation - different tenant cannot PATCH superbrides shops (404)
Frontend Admin: Locations page displays location cards with edit buttons
Frontend Admin: Edit modal opens with prefilled fields (loc-name, loc-role, loc-address, loc-phone, loc-email, loc-blurb, loc-hours)
Frontend Admin: Edit modal Save button updates location and shows success toast
Frontend Admin: Location card updates with new name and address after save
Frontend Admin: Add Location button opens create modal
Frontend Public: /superbrides booking page Step 1 'Choose Your Boutique' displays updated boutique names and addresses
Frontend Public: Multiple boutiques (2+) are selectable and clickable
Frontend Public: Clicking boutique card advances to appointment selection step
Frontend Public: Back button returns to boutique selection
Frontend Public: Second boutique can be selected successfully
Regression: poc_isolation.py passes all 35 tests (tenant isolation, cross-tenant protection, suspend/expire gating)
